data_description.api_url: Base URL of your kio API, e.g. http://api.kio.example.local
data_description.api_key: Optional API key (X-API-Key). Leave blank if auth is disabled.
data_description.api_ip: Optional. If HA cannot resolve the hostname (e.g. .int TLD DNS issue), enter the server IP here (e.g. 192.168.1.10).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the kio API. Check the URL and network.

abort.already_configured: This kio instance is already configured.
